title: Lagunas
collaboration: Interactive video installation by Laura Colmenaress Guerra
description:
Parametric video sequencer in MaxMSP-Jitter controlling three vertical displays
                            / Arduino shield design and C programing to gather IR sensors' data to measure the rotation of three levers for the users to interact with
                            / Timeline-based UI designed in JS within MaxMSP-Jitter to edit complex sequences 
                            / GLSL Pixel Shader development
                            / Dynamic assignment of users' input to control Video Players & Pixel Shader
                            / Interactive Scenario with multiple developments and endings
longDescription:

                            / Dynamic assignment of users' input to control Video Players & Pixel Shader
                            / Interactive Scenario with multiple developments and endings
